records.question: What businesses named Cafe Bellini located at 865 MARKET St C45 have the owner LEGRIN, INC., are in California with owner zip 94102, postal code 94103, tax code H24, and latitude 37.7843?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT businesses.business_id FROM businesses
JOIN violations ON businesses.business_id = violations.business_id
WHERE businesses.owner_state = 'CA' AND businesses.owner_zip = '94102' AND businesses.tax_code = 'H24' AND businesses.postal_code = '94103' AND businesses.name = 'Cafe Bellini' AND businesses.address = '865 MARKET St C45' AND businesses.owner_name = 'LEGRIN, INC.' AND businesses.latitude = 37.7843
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.business_id FROM businesses AS T1 INNER JOIN violations AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id WHERE T1.owner_state = 'CA' AND T1.owner_zip = '94102' AND T1.tax_code = 'H24' AND T1.postal_code = '94103' AND T1.name = 'Cafe Bellini' AND T1.address = '865 MARKET St C45' AND T1.owner_name = 'LEGRIN, INC.' AND T1.latitude = 37.7843

records.question: Which businesses owned by Munchery Inc. in SF applied since 2013-08-29, had a Routine - Unscheduled inspection scoring exactly 92.0, and received a Moderate Risk violation for Insufficient hot water or running water on 2014-04-14?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT businesses.business_id FROM businesses
JOIN inspections ON businesses.business_id = inspections.business_id
JOIN violations ON businesses.business_id = violations.business_id
WHERE businesses.city = 'SF' AND violations.risk_category = 'Moderate Risk' AND violations.description = 'Insufficient hot water or running water' AND businesses.owner_name = 'Munchery Inc.' AND businesses.application_date >= '2013-08-29' AND inspections.type = 'Routine - Unscheduled' AND inspections.score = 92.0 AND violations.date = '2014-04-14'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.business_id FROM businesses AS T1 WHERE T1.city = 'SF' AND T1.owner_name = 'Munchery Inc.' AND T1.application_date >= '2013-08-29' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM inspections AS T2 WHERE T1.business_id = T2.business_id AND T2.type = 'Routine - Unscheduled' AND T2.score = 92 ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM violations AS T3 WHERE T1.business_id = T3.business_id AND T3.risk_category = 'Moderate Risk' AND T3.description = 'Insufficient hot water or running water' AND T3.date = '2014-04-14' )

records.pred_sql: SELECT business_id FROM businesses WHERE latitude = 37.7814 AND longitude = -122.399

records.question: Which businesses named Elephant Sushi 3 in SF applied on or after 2014-02-06, had an inspection on 2014-02-25, and received a Low Risk violation?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT businesses.business_id FROM businesses
JOIN inspections ON businesses.business_id = inspections.business_id
JOIN violations ON businesses.business_id = violations.business_id
WHERE violations.risk_category = 'Low Risk' AND businesses.city = 'SF' AND businesses.application_date >= '2014-02-06' AND inspections.date = '2014-02-25' AND businesses.name = 'Elephant Sushi 3'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.business_id FROM businesses AS T1 INNER JOIN inspections AS T2 ON T1.business_id = T2.business_id INNER JOIN violations AS T3 ON T1.business_id = T3.business_id WHERE T1.city = 'SF' AND T1.application_date >= '2014-02-06' AND T1.name = 'Elephant Sushi 3' AND T2.date = '2014-02-25' AND T3.risk_category = 'Low Risk'

records.question: Which businesses named House of Thai are located in SF with a longitude of -122.418, have a business certificate number of at least 450957, and whose postal code and owner zip both are exactly 94109?

SELECT businesses.business_id FROM businesses
WHERE businesses.longitude = -122.418 AND businesses.business_certificate >= 450957 AND businesses.postal_code = '94109' AND businesses.owner_zip = '94109' AND businesses.city = 'SF' AND businesses.name = 'House of Thai'
records.pred_sql: SELECT business_id FROM businesses WHERE longitude = -122.418 AND business_certificate >= 450957 AND postal_code = '94109' AND owner_zip = '94109' AND city = 'SF' AND name = 'House of Thai'

records.question: Which businesses located in San Francisco with an owner address at 388 Potrero Ave. have violations categorized as Low Risk?

JOIN violations ON businesses.business_id = violations.business_id
WHERE businesses.city = 'San Francisco' AND violations.risk_category = 'Low Risk' AND businesses.owner_address = '388 Potrero Ave.'
